SERVICE

Beard Transplant

A full beard with natural density and proper growth direction. Individual plan and Czech-speaking support.

Price from 69,900 CZK
Free consultation How it works

PROBLEM

Why beard transplant?

Are you troubled by gaps in your beard, uneven growth or insufficient density? A permanent solution exists.

Genetics

For most men, beard density and shape are genetically determined. Even with normal testosterone levels, the beard shape may be uneven and density low.

Gaps and density

Gaps in the beard, irregular or insufficient growth can disrupt the overall appearance of your beard.

Psychological impact

Beard appearance can affect your confidence and overall satisfaction. Transplantation is a permanent solution that helps achieve a fuller and more balanced facial appearance.

SOLUTION

How it works

Hair transplantation is performed with emphasis on precise graft placement and natural growth direction

Graft extraction

Grafts are extracted from the donor area in the occipital part of the head. They are genetically resistant and most suitable for beard transplantation.

Beard implantation

The grafts are then implanted into the beard area according to an individual design for shape and density. Each graft is placed individually with maximum precision.

Natural direction and density

During implantation, we pay attention to the correct angle and growth direction so that the result looks natural and harmonious with your facial features.

RECOMMENDATION

Who is the transplant suitable for?

We always assess each case individually. To achieve the best results, we recommend transplantation especially in the following cases:

23+

Age

The procedure can be performed on adult clients. However, we recommend waiting until beard growth is stabilized, which usually occurs from the age of 23-25.

✓

Stabilized condition

Before the transplant, beard growth should already be settled and density unchanging. This allows us to plan a long-term natural result.

Donor area

There should be sufficient hair density in the occipital area of the head. The quality of the donor area fundamentally affects the number of grafts extracted and the final result.

METHODS

Transplant methods

Both the DHI and Sapphire FUE methods represent the current state of the art in hair transplantation. The choice of method is always recommended by the doctor based on hair analysis and the scope of the procedure.

DHI

DHI method

Direct implantation of hair grafts using the Choi Implanter Pen

  • Suitable for densification between existing beard hair
  • Precise work with beard direction and density
  • Ideal for small to medium areas
Learn more about DHI →
Sapphire FUE

Sapphire FUE

Before implantation, channels are created with a sapphire blade into which the hair grafts are placed

  • Suitable for larger areas
  • Efficient with a higher number of grafts
  • Sapphire blade instead of steel for greater gentleness and faster healing
Learn more about Sapphire FUE →

ALL-INCLUSIVE

PROCESS

How does the transplant work?

From the first consultation to the final result – step by step.

1

Consultation

The free initial consultation takes place online. Our medical consultant will evaluate your current condition, review photographs, and after consulting with the doctor in Istanbul, prepare an individual procedure plan including the recommended method and estimated number of grafts.

2

Preparation

Once the plan is approved, we will arrange all travel logistics – accommodation, transfers and other details. You will receive clear instructions for preparation, including recommendations regarding medication and scalp care.

3

Procedure

Upon arrival in Istanbul, our Czech-speaking representative will pick you up at the airport and will be available throughout your stay. This is followed by transfer to the hotel and check-in. The next day, the procedure is performed under local anesthesia. The entire process takes approximately 6–8 hours depending on the scope of the transplant.

4

Healing

In the following weeks after the procedure, healing and skin regeneration takes place. During this period, the transplanted grafts stabilize and gradually take root in the new area. We will provide you with detailed instructions for home care and proper skin care.

5

Growth

Transplanted beard hair typically begins to grow after 3–4 months. Gradual thickening continues for several more months, with the final result visible approximately after 12–15 months. We stay in regular contact with you throughout and are available for any questions.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions about beard transplant

The procedure is performed under local anesthesia and is completely painless. You may feel slight discomfort for the first few minutes during anesthesia application. After the procedure, you may feel mild pressure that quickly subsides.

The duration of the procedure depends on the scope of the transplant and the number of grafts. It most commonly takes 6 to 8 hours. There are, of course, breaks for rest and refreshments during the procedure.

The first new beard hair begins to appear approximately 3-4 months after the procedure. Visible improvement in density occurs around the 6th month. The final result is usually visible after 9-12 months, for some clients up to 12-15 months.

Yes, with a properly planned and performed procedure, the new beard looks very natural. For beard transplantation, the correct angle, direction, and density of the implanted grafts are key. The goal is for the result to not look artificial but to be in harmony with your facial features.

Yes, transplantation makes it possible to create a new beard shape and density even in areas where growth is almost absent. However, it always depends on the quality and density of the donor area. As part of the analysis, we will propose a realistic shape and number of grafts so that the result looks natural.
